_comment: Example OpenClaw configuration for Xiangqi Tutor skill

sandbox._note: Set to 'off' if not using Docker, or 'non-main' if Docker is available

tts._note: Voice replies are sent via WhatsApp. EricNeural is recommended for high school students.

_dmPolicyOptions.allowlist: Only responds to numbers in allowFrom

_groupPolicyOptions.allowlist: Only responds in groups listed in groupAllowFrom

_setup: 1. Scan QR code in OpenClaw Mac app Settings -> Channels -> WhatsApp
2. Add your phone number (without +) to allowFrom array
3. Students can scan the QR code in index.html to start chatting

_deployment_notes.whatsapp_number: Your WhatsApp Business number or personal number
_deployment_notes.qr_code_page: Deploy index.html to share with students
_deployment_notes.voice_replies: Automatically sent as audio messages via WhatsApp

privacy.note: This is a local AI tutor. No student data is sent to external servers.
privacy.sandbox_mode: Set to 'off' for teaching scenarios, 'always' for production

_quick_setup: 2. Configure WhatsApp in OpenClaw Mac app (scan QR code)
3. Add student phone numbers to channels.whatsapp.allowFrom
5. Deploy index.html for students to scan and start learning
6. Test by sending 'Teach me Chinese chess' via WhatsApp
